reason: Approved design is the source of implementation scope and terminology.
Implementation must execute steps in order and update step status.
Requirement explains the user-visible workflow capability and boundaries.
Roadmap item and module split are hard constraints for this feature.
Context Manifest Files contract is a hard roadmap companion constraint.
New shared contract being implemented defines row shape and blocking semantics.
Design records standard execution mode and required evidence vocabulary.
Implementation completion must include review gate evidence.
